topics.title: Whale Watching in Mirissa
topics.description: Mirissa is one of the world's best destinations for Blue Whale watching. Visitors can also spot Sperm Whales, Bryde's Whales, Spinner Dolphins and many other marine species throughout the season.

topics.title: Best Time to Visit
topics.description: The best whale watching season in Mirissa runs from November to April, offering calm seas and excellent opportunities to observe marine wildlife.

topics.title: Boat Experience
topics.description: Our boats include comfortable seating, breakfast, life jackets, insurance, toilet facilities and experienced crew members.

topics.title: Marine Wildlife
topics.description: Along with Blue Whales, visitors often encounter Spinner Dolphins, Flying Fish, Sea Turtles and occasionally Killer Whales.

topics.title: Getting to Mirissa
topics.description: Mirissa is approximately 150 km south of Colombo and is easily accessible via the Southern Expressway or scenic coastal railway.

topics.title: Photography Tips
topics.description: Bring a zoom lens, sunglasses and keep your camera ready as whale sightings often happen unexpectedly.

topics.title: What to Bring
topics.description: Wear lightweight clothing and bring sunscreen, sunglasses, a hat, camera and motion sickness tablets if required.

topics.title: Frequently Asked Questions
topics.description: Find answers regarding bookings, cancellations, children, weather conditions and tour schedules.
